entities.name: list-view
entities.context: N5 tool (v1.0.0) that generates on-demand markdown views from JSONL list sources

entities.name: Single Source of Truth (SSOT)
entities.context: Design principle enforced by list-view - keeping one canonical data source

entities.name: JSONL
entities.context: File format used as the only source of truth for lists

entities.name: dual-write sync
entities.context: Complexity pattern that SSOT eliminates by avoiding parallel data stores

relationships.context: Tool enforces SSOT by generating views on-demand rather than maintaining synced copies
Reads from .jsonl files as the canonical data source
SSOT principle eliminates the need for dual-write synchronization
